local-wp._comment: Local by Flywheel / Local WP site discovery for mscclean.local

mcp-wordpress._comment: WordPress REST MCP — credentials synced from .env.local via npm run sync:mcp-env

browsermcp._comment: Allows Cursor/Claude to control your actual open Chrome/Edge browser window locally.

browserbase._comment: Cloud browser automation with Browserbase and Stagehand.

21st-dev-magic._comment: Allows building beautiful frontend components directly into the codebase with 21st.dev Magic MCP.

antigravity-awesome-skills._comment: Access and auto-install over 1,500+ agentic skills/playbooks for Cursor (.cursor/skills/).

markdownify._comment: Converts web content, PDFs, images (OCR), and document files directly to Markdown.
